channel.title: Business Wire News
channel.description: Business Wire - A Berkshire Hathaway Company

item.title: CrowdStrike Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
item.description: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. today announced financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended January 31, 2026. Total revenue grew 29% year-over-year to $1.06 billion. Annual recurring revenue (ARR) increased 30% year-over-year to $4.24 billion.

item.title: Endeavor Silver Corp. Completes Acquisition of Terronera Mine
item.description: Endeavor Silver Corp. announced the completion of its acquisition of the Terronera silver-gold mine in Jalisco, Mexico for total consideration of approximately $320 million.

item.title: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals Receives FDA Approval for Expanded Indication
item.description: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals, Inc. announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved an expanded indication for its lead product, Avenova. The company expects the expanded label to significantly increase its addressable market.
